# WebsiteMakenPro

> Professional web + AI agency based in the Netherlands. Builds websites for Dutch SMEs with fixed-price packages starting at €749. AI features (chatbot, content generation, automation) are integrated by default, not bolted on afterwards. Founded and operated by a BSc Computer Engineer.

## About

WebsiteMakenPro serves Dutch entrepreneurs (MKB) who want a professional website without the traditional agency overhead. Unique positioning: fixed transparent pricing, direct contact with the builder (no account managers), and AI integration from day one.

## Services

- **Starter** (€749): Single-page long-scroll website with CMS, SEO setup, mobile-first responsive design. Delivery in 10 working days.
- **Pro** (€1.495): Multi-page website (up to 7 pages) with custom design, embedded AI-chatbot, content assistance, per-page SEO. Delivery in 3 weeks.
- **Business** (€2.995): Full-featured website (up to 15 pages) with AI integrations (chatbot + WhatsApp automation + email drip), booking system, 3 months priority support. Delivery in 6 weeks.
- **Custom** (from €5.000): E-commerce, custom AI platforms, complex integrations. Always fixed-price quoted upfront.

## Differentiators

- Fixed prices, no hourly billing or scope creep surprises
- AI features integrated by default in Pro and Business packages
- Direct communication with the builder (BSc Computer Engineer, 14 years experience)
- Code ownership: client gets 100% of code, CMS access, domain — no vendor lock-in
- Delivery times range from 10 days (Starter) to 6 weeks (Business)

## Ideal Customer

- Dutch SME owners considering a new website or a serious redesign
- Entrepreneurs who want AI capabilities but don't want separate AI consulting projects
- Business owners who prefer transparent pricing over "it depends" agency estimates
- Companies where the owner wants direct contact with the technical builder

## Contact

- Website: https://websitemakenpro.nl/
- Email: info@websitemakenpro.nl
- WhatsApp: +31 6 27246429
- Service area: Netherlands (primary), Dutch-speaking clients internationally
